records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Is she not home again today?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Is she not home again today?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Is she not home again today?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you here to see Lugh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you here to see Lugh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you here to see Lugh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa! You almost scared me to death.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa! You almost scared me to death.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa! You almost scared me to death.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing here, gramps?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing here, gramps?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing here, gramps?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am delivering the finished custom clothes to its owner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am delivering the finished custom clothes to its owner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am delivering the finished custom clothes to its owner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it seems that no one is home at the moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it seems that no one is home at the moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it seems that no one is home at the moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's been empty for the last four days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's been empty for the last four days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's been empty for the last four days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought she'd be back by now... but I guess I was wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought she'd be back by now... but I guess I was wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought she'd be back by now... but I guess I was wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, Miss Morgana has also been missing since about that time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, Miss Morgana has also been missing since about that time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, Miss Morgana has also been missing since about that time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure that both are temporarily absent to do something important.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure that both are temporarily absent to do something important.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure that both are temporarily absent to do something important.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, that's reassuring to know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, that's reassuring to know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, that's reassuring to know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How is your mother?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How is your mother?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How is your mother?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's now able to go out of the house using her crutches.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's now able to go out of the house using her crutches.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's now able to go out of the house using her crutches.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But thinking about how the monster could attack the village again... I don't think it's safe for her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But thinking about how the monster could attack the village again... I don't think it's safe for her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But thinking about how the monster could attack the village again... I don't think it's safe for her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you're here out of concern for your mother, correct?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you're here out of concern for your mother, correct?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you're here out of concern for your mother, correct?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was wondering... if she could teach me how to fight those monsters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was wondering... if she could teach me how to fight those monsters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was wondering... if she could teach me how to fight those monsters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She might laugh at the idea and kick me out, but... I still think I should ask.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She might laugh at the idea and kick me out, but... I still think I should ask.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She might laugh at the idea and kick me out, but... I still think I should ask.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You saw how Ms. Lugh fought with your own eyes too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You saw how Ms. Lugh fought with your own eyes too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You saw how Ms. Lugh fought with your own eyes too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She is a warrior from a distant country beyond the gelid lands. Didn't she look so great?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She is a warrior from a distant country beyond the gelid lands. Didn't she look so great?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She is a warrior from a distant country beyond the gelid lands. Didn't she look so great?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, she really gave those monsters a beating.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, she really gave those monsters a beating.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, she really gave those monsters a beating.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I could almost see an aura around her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I could almost see an aura around her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I could almost see an aura around her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to repay her somehow... but I don't know what to do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to repay her somehow... but I don't know what to do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to repay her somehow... but I don't know what to do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I don't know how to fight monsters... and I'll have to rely on Helgons for protection.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I don't know how to fight monsters... and I'll have to rely on Helgons for protection.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I don't know how to fight monsters... and I'll have to rely on Helgons for protection.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, I think it's up to how much effort you are willing to put into it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, I think it's up to how much effort you are willing to put into it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, I think it's up to how much effort you are willing to put into it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I'm not even a Helgon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I'm not even a Helgon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I'm not even a Helgon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing her fight made me realize how small and weak I am.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing her fight made me realize how small and weak I am.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing her fight made me realize how small and weak I am.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because you are just a small and weak kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because you are just a small and weak kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because you are just a small and weak kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that's not what I'm talking about!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that's not what I'm talking about!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's not what I'm talking about!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Helgons can do anything by themselves and don't need our help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Helgons can do anything by themselves and don't need our help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Helgons can do anything by themselves and don't need our help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's... nothing that I can do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's... nothing that I can do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's... nothing that I can do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Karolis.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Karolis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Karolis.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You will never be able to become a Helgon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You will never be able to become a Helgon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You will never be able to become a Helgon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch... I know that much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch... I know that much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch... I know that much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that does not mean that they are different beings from us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that does not mean that they are different beings from us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that does not mean that they are different beings from us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are also humans who have the same emotions as us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are also humans who have the same emotions as us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are also humans who have the same emotions as us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They get equally hurt by the actions and words of ordinary people, and not even a Helgon will be able to recover easily from such wounds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They get equally hurt by the actions and words of ordinary people, and not even a Helgon will be able to recover easily from such wounds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They get equally hurt by the actions and words of ordinary people, and not even a Helgon will be able to recover easily from such wounds.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Ah
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Ah
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Ah
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: What I'm trying to say is that even an ordinary person can have a great influence on Helgons.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What I'm trying to say is that even an ordinary person can have a great influence on Helgons.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What I'm trying to say is that even an ordinary person can have a great influence on Helgons.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if we are relatively weak, the power of our words and actions is by no means trivial.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if we are relatively weak, the power of our words and actions is by no means trivial.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if we are relatively weak, the power of our words and actions is by no means trivial.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, do you think I can be of help to her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, do you think I can be of help to her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, do you think I can be of help to her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you truly wish it, yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you truly wish it, yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you truly wish it, yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Helgons might be protecting us now, but... a day will come when we will have to protect them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Helgons might be protecting us now, but... a day will come when we will have to protect them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Helgons might be protecting us now, but... a day will come when we will have to protect them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think it'll be nice...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think it'll be nice...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think it'll be nice...

records.m_Talk_ENG: to be able to share their burden of responsibility like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: to be able to share their burden of responsibility like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: to be able to share their burden of responsibility like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A light from the sky...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A light from the sky...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A light from the sky...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it a star?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it a star?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it a star?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaak!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaak!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaak!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's falling!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's falling!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's falling!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oww...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oww...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oww...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lugh, are you all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lugh, are you all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lugh, are you all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes, I think I'm good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes, I think I'm good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes, I think I'm good.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I'm glad I landed on something soft
8g

I'm glad I landed on something soft
8g

I'm glad I landed on something soft
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Soft?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Soft?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Soft?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my! Karolis!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my! Karolis!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my! Karolis!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The boy will be fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The boy will be fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The boy will be fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He avoided serious injury as cutie did not fall on top of him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He avoided serious injury as cutie did not fall on top of him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He avoided serious injury as cutie did not fall on top of him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that makes it sound like I'm heavier! At least be more precise and say that it's because my weapon is heavy!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that makes it sound like I'm heavier! At least be more precise and say that it's because my weapon is heavy!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that makes it sound like I'm heavier! At least be more precise and say that it's because my weapon is heavy!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew, I'm relieved to hear that he wasn't seriously hurt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew, I'm relieved to hear that he wasn't seriously hurt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew, I'm relieved to hear that he wasn't seriously hurt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, to continue our conversation...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, to continue our conversation...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, to continue our conversation...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just seconds before you returned, an intense plague energy was detected there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just seconds before you returned, an intense plague energy was detected there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just seconds before you returned, an intense plague energy was detected there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can you tell me what the last thing you saw was?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can you tell me what the last thing you saw was?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can you tell me what the last thing you saw was?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was the pumpkin-head devil that we saw in the South.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was the pumpkin-head devil that we saw in the South.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was the pumpkin-head devil that we saw in the South.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think he got grumpy because we set one of his prisoners free.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think he got grumpy because we set one of his prisoners free.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think he got grumpy because we set one of his prisoners free.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You set a prisoner free...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You set a prisoner free...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You set a prisoner free...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're not actually sure if she was a prisoner or not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're not actually sure if she was a prisoner or not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're not actually sure if she was a prisoner or not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was pretty scary to see her scream while fighting, but she was super strong... And she didn't seem to harbor any malice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was pretty scary to see her scream while fighting, but she was super strong... And she didn't seem to harbor any malice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was pretty scary to see her scream while fighting, but she was super strong... And she didn't seem to harbor any malice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm guessing that this prisoner was locked up because the Demon Lord didn't like her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm guessing that this prisoner was locked up because the Demon Lord didn't like her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm guessing that this prisoner was locked up because the Demon Lord didn't like her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, we were running away from the devil's henchmen when we ran into the devil himself, and that's when Ms. Lugh used the dagger to escape.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, we were running away from the devil's henchmen when we ran into the devil himself, and that's when Ms. Lugh used the dagger to escape.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, we were running away from the devil's henchmen when we ran into the devil himself, and that's when Ms. Lugh used the dagger to escape.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We couldn't find... where the Golden Branch was.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We couldn't find... where the Golden Branch was.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We couldn't find... where the Golden Branch was.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see. But no need to be discouraged.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see. But no need to be discouraged.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see. But no need to be discouraged.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You did good. It is better for you to return empty-handed than not returning at all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You did good. It is better for you to return empty-handed than not returning at all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You did good. It is better for you to return empty-handed than not returning at all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The devil wasn't the only one there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The devil wasn't the only one there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The devil wasn't the only one there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? There were more?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? There were more?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? There were more?

records.m_Talk_ENG: While he was talking to us... I could feel something getting closer from beyond the snowstorm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: While he was talking to us... I could feel something getting closer from beyond the snowstorm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: While he was talking to us... I could feel something getting closer from beyond the snowstorm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we had to flee before we could get a better look.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we had to flee before we could get a better look.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we had to flee before we could get a better look.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An ominous entity that could be felt even with a devil in your presence...
records.m_Talk_DEU: An ominous entity that could be felt even with a devil in your presence...
records.m_Talk_FRA: An ominous entity that could be felt even with a devil in your presence...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is a shame, but it would be best not to go back there ever again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is a shame, but it would be best not to go back there ever again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is a shame, but it would be best not to go back there ever again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?! But we haven't found the Golden Branch yet!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?! But we haven't found the Golden Branch yet!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?! But we haven't found the Golden Branch yet!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Demon Lord is as persistent as a devil.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Demon Lord is as persistent as a devil.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Demon Lord is as persistent as a devil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As long as they know you have been there, there will not be another time of going back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As long as they know you have been there, there will not be another time of going back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As long as they know you have been there, there will not be another time of going back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good work, you two. Go get some rest as I am sure you are both exhausted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good work, you two. Go get some rest as I am sure you are both exhausted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good work, you two. Go get some rest as I am sure you are both exhausted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... can I have some grapes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... can I have some grapes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... can I have some grapes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have already prepared them on the table in the next room for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have already prepared them on the table in the next room for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have already prepared them on the table in the next room for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... She really seems like a little kid at times like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... She really seems like a little kid at times like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... She really seems like a little kid at times like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once winter comes to the Stump, finding fruit will be difficult.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once winter comes to the Stump, finding fruit will be difficult.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once winter comes to the Stump, finding fruit will be difficult.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you should have some as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you should have some as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you should have some as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you know, Merlin?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you know, Merlin?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you know, Merlin?

records.m_Talk_ENG: About the place we went to?
records.m_Talk_DEU: About the place we went to?
records.m_Talk_FRA: About the place we went to?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As I have told you before your departure, it is the first time we have observed the other side of the world with our technology.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As I have told you before your departure, it is the first time we have observed the other side of the world with our technology.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As I have told you before your departure, it is the first time we have observed the other side of the world with our technology.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I merely assumed what kind of place it would be.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I merely assumed what kind of place it would be.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I merely assumed what kind of place it would be.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However...
records.m_Talk_DEU: However...
records.m_Talk_FRA: However...

records.m_Talk_ENG: seeing your expression seems to tell me that it was familiar to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: seeing your expression seems to tell me that it was familiar to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: seeing your expression seems to tell me that it was familiar to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The hometown I remembered had turned into white gelid lands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The hometown I remembered had turned into white gelid lands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The hometown I remembered had turned into white gelid lands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was all in ruins without a single trace of people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was all in ruins without a single trace of people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was all in ruins without a single trace of people.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Nothing can escape the grasp of the gelid lands' plague.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Nothing can escape the grasp of the gelid lands' plague.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Nothing can escape the grasp of the gelid lands' plague.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is simply a matter of time. As it was for Avalon in the past, and the same for us now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is simply a matter of time. As it was for Avalon in the past, and the same for us now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is simply a matter of time. As it was for Avalon in the past, and the same for us now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In Elysion... everyone lived with the belief that they would be safe from the gelid lands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In Elysion... everyone lived with the belief that they would be safe from the gelid lands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In Elysion... everyone lived with the belief that they would be safe from the gelid lands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But in just a few years... how could something like this even happen?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But in just a few years... how could something like this even happen?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But in just a few years... how could something like this even happen?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Beliefs often collapse in the face of uncertain reality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Beliefs often collapse in the face of uncertain reality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Beliefs often collapse in the face of uncertain reality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even when Avalon still stood tall, everyone there also believed in something similar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even when Avalon still stood tall, everyone there also believed in something similar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even when Avalon still stood tall, everyone there also believed in something similar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, a plague unforeseen by prophecies spread throughout the world, and with the Demon Lord Thagirion's descent...
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, a plague unforeseen by prophecies spread throughout the world, and with the Demon Lord Thagirion's descent...
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, a plague unforeseen by prophecies spread throughout the world, and with the Demon Lord Thagirion's descent...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Avalon, which I thought would last for an eternity, abruptly turned into the gelid lands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Avalon, which I thought would last for an eternity, abruptly turned into the gelid lands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Avalon, which I thought would last for an eternity, abruptly turned into the gelid lands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...! That's just what's recorded in history!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...! That's just what's recorded in history!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...! That's just what's recorded in history!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Elysion had nothing to do with the Demon Lord's descent!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Elysion had nothing to do with the Demon Lord's descent!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Elysion had nothing to do with the Demon Lord's descent!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fifty years ago. The sun disappeared for an entire day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fifty years ago. The sun disappeared for an entire day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fifty years ago. The sun disappeared for an entire day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The lightless sky made anyone looking up lose their minds, and the earth was rampant with monsters and bloodshed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The lightless sky made anyone looking up lose their minds, and the earth was rampant with monsters and bloodshed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The lightless sky made anyone looking up lose their minds, and the earth was rampant with monsters and bloodshed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That omen was the same as when the Demon Lord Thagirion descended.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That omen was the same as when the Demon Lord Thagirion descended.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That omen was the same as when the Demon Lord Thagirion descended.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...? Fifty years ago?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...? Fifty years ago?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...? Fifty years ago?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I've never heard of such a catastrophic event... happening twice. It wasn't in any historical records.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I've never heard of such a catastrophic event... happening twice. It wasn't in any historical records.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I've never heard of such a catastrophic event... happening twice. It wasn't in any historical records.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, you never heard of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, you never heard of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, you never heard of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Around the time Elysion was falling, you were asleep in the middle of the gelid lands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Around the time Elysion was falling, you were asleep in the middle of the gelid lands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Around the time Elysion was falling, you were asleep in the middle of the gelid lands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That can't be right!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That can't be right!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That can't be right!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was born in Elysion! I still vividly remember the things I experienced there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was born in Elysion! I still vividly remember the things I experienced there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was born in Elysion! I still vividly remember the things I experienced there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am not doubting your memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am not doubting your memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am not doubting your memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it is also true that you have no idea how long you were trapped beneath the snow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it is also true that you have no idea how long you were trapped beneath the snow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it is also true that you have no idea how long you were trapped beneath the snow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fifty years? That's ridiculous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fifty years? That's ridiculous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fifty years? That's ridiculous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even the strongest of Helgons cannot survive trapped underneath the snow for fifty years.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even the strongest of Helgons cannot survive trapped underneath the snow for fifty years.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even the strongest of Helgons cannot survive trapped underneath the snow for fifty years.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yet, it is also not impossible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yet, it is also not impossible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yet, it is also not impossible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If a fairy has been protecting you, that is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If a fairy has been protecting you, that is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If a fairy has been protecting you, that is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A... fairy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A... fairy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A... fairy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Is she not home again today?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Is she not home again today?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Is she not home again today?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you here to see Lugh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you here to see Lugh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you here to see Lugh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa! You almost scared me to death.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa! You almost scared me to death.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa! You almost scared me to death.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing here, gramps?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing here, gramps?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing here, gramps?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am delivering the finished custom clothes to its owner.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am delivering the finished custom clothes to its owner.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am delivering the finished custom clothes to its owner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it seems that no one is home at the moment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it seems that no one is home at the moment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it seems that no one is home at the moment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's been empty for the last four days.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's been empty for the last four days.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's been empty for the last four days.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought she'd be back by now... but I guess I was wrong.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought she'd be back by now... but I guess I was wrong.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought she'd be back by now... but I guess I was wrong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, Miss Morgana has also been missing since about that time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, Miss Morgana has also been missing since about that time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, Miss Morgana has also been missing since about that time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure that both are temporarily absent to do something important.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure that both are temporarily absent to do something important.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure that both are temporarily absent to do something important.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, that's reassuring to know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, that's reassuring to know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, that's reassuring to know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How is your mother?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How is your mother?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How is your mother?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's now able to go out of the house using her crutches.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's now able to go out of the house using her crutches.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's now able to go out of the house using her crutches.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But thinking about how the monster could attack the village again... I don't think it's safe for her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But thinking about how the monster could attack the village again... I don't think it's safe for her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But thinking about how the monster could attack the village again... I don't think it's safe for her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you're here out of concern for your mother, correct?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you're here out of concern for your mother, correct?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you're here out of concern for your mother, correct?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was wondering... if she could teach me how to fight those monsters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was wondering... if she could teach me how to fight those monsters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was wondering... if she could teach me how to fight those monsters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She might laugh at the idea and kick me out, but... I still think I should ask.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She might laugh at the idea and kick me out, but... I still think I should ask.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She might laugh at the idea and kick me out, but... I still think I should ask.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You saw how Ms. Lugh fought with your own eyes too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You saw how Ms. Lugh fought with your own eyes too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You saw how Ms. Lugh fought with your own eyes too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She is a warrior from a distant country beyond the gelid lands. Didn't she look so great?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She is a warrior from a distant country beyond the gelid lands. Didn't she look so great?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She is a warrior from a distant country beyond the gelid lands. Didn't she look so great?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, she really gave those monsters a beating.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, she really gave those monsters a beating.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, she really gave those monsters a beating.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I could almost see an aura around her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I could almost see an aura around her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I could almost see an aura around her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I want to repay her somehow... but I don't know what to do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I want to repay her somehow... but I don't know what to do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I want to repay her somehow... but I don't know what to do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because I don't know how to fight monsters... and I'll have to rely on Helgons for protection.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because I don't know how to fight monsters... and I'll have to rely on Helgons for protection.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because I don't know how to fight monsters... and I'll have to rely on Helgons for protection.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, I think it's up to how much effort you are willing to put into it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, I think it's up to how much effort you are willing to put into it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, I think it's up to how much effort you are willing to put into it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I'm not even a Helgon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I'm not even a Helgon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I'm not even a Helgon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing her fight made me realize how small and weak I am.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing her fight made me realize how small and weak I am.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing her fight made me realize how small and weak I am.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's because you are just a small and weak kid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's because you are just a small and weak kid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's because you are just a small and weak kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that's not what I'm talking about!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that's not what I'm talking about!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's not what I'm talking about!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Helgons can do anything by themselves and don't need our help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Helgons can do anything by themselves and don't need our help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Helgons can do anything by themselves and don't need our help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's... nothing that I can do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's... nothing that I can do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's... nothing that I can do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Karolis.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Karolis.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Karolis.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You will never be able to become a Helgon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You will never be able to become a Helgon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You will never be able to become a Helgon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch... I know that much.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch... I know that much.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch... I know that much.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But that does not mean that they are different beings from us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But that does not mean that they are different beings from us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But that does not mean that they are different beings from us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They are also humans who have the same emotions as us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They are also humans who have the same emotions as us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They are also humans who have the same emotions as us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They get equally hurt by the actions and words of ordinary people, and not even a Helgon will be able to recover easily from such wounds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They get equally hurt by the actions and words of ordinary people, and not even a Helgon will be able to recover easily from such wounds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They get equally hurt by the actions and words of ordinary people, and not even a Helgon will be able to recover easily from such wounds.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Ah
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Ah
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Ah
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: What I'm trying to say is that even an ordinary person can have a great influence on Helgons.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What I'm trying to say is that even an ordinary person can have a great influence on Helgons.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What I'm trying to say is that even an ordinary person can have a great influence on Helgons.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if we are relatively weak, the power of our words and actions is by no means trivial.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if we are relatively weak, the power of our words and actions is by no means trivial.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if we are relatively weak, the power of our words and actions is by no means trivial.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, do you think I can be of help to her?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, do you think I can be of help to her?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, do you think I can be of help to her?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you truly wish it, yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you truly wish it, yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you truly wish it, yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Helgons might be protecting us now, but... a day will come when we will have to protect them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Helgons might be protecting us now, but... a day will come when we will have to protect them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Helgons might be protecting us now, but... a day will come when we will have to protect them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think it'll be nice...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think it'll be nice...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think it'll be nice...

root.m_Talk_ENG: to be able to share their burden of responsibility like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: to be able to share their burden of responsibility like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: to be able to share their burden of responsibility like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A light from the sky...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A light from the sky...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A light from the sky...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is it a star?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is it a star?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is it a star?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaak!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaak!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaak!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's falling!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's falling!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's falling!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oww...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oww...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oww...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lugh, are you all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lugh, are you all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lugh, are you all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes, I think I'm good.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes, I think I'm good.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes, I think I'm good.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I'm glad I landed on something soft
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I'm glad I landed on something soft
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I'm glad I landed on something soft
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Soft?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Soft?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Soft?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my! Karolis!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my! Karolis!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my! Karolis!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The boy will be fine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The boy will be fine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The boy will be fine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: He avoided serious injury as cutie did not fall on top of him.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He avoided serious injury as cutie did not fall on top of him.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He avoided serious injury as cutie did not fall on top of him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that makes it sound like I'm heavier! At least be more precise and say that it's because my weapon is heavy!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that makes it sound like I'm heavier! At least be more precise and say that it's because my weapon is heavy!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that makes it sound like I'm heavier! At least be more precise and say that it's because my weapon is heavy!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Phew, I'm relieved to hear that he wasn't seriously hurt.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Phew, I'm relieved to hear that he wasn't seriously hurt.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Phew, I'm relieved to hear that he wasn't seriously hurt.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, to continue our conversation...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, to continue our conversation...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, to continue our conversation...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just seconds before you returned, an intense plague energy was detected there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just seconds before you returned, an intense plague energy was detected there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just seconds before you returned, an intense plague energy was detected there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can you tell me what the last thing you saw was?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can you tell me what the last thing you saw was?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can you tell me what the last thing you saw was?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was the pumpkin-head devil that we saw in the South.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was the pumpkin-head devil that we saw in the South.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was the pumpkin-head devil that we saw in the South.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think he got grumpy because we set one of his prisoners free.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think he got grumpy because we set one of his prisoners free.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think he got grumpy because we set one of his prisoners free.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You set a prisoner free...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You set a prisoner free...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You set a prisoner free...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're not actually sure if she was a prisoner or not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're not actually sure if she was a prisoner or not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're not actually sure if she was a prisoner or not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was pretty scary to see her scream while fighting, but she was super strong... And she didn't seem to harbor any malice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was pretty scary to see her scream while fighting, but she was super strong... And she didn't seem to harbor any malice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was pretty scary to see her scream while fighting, but she was super strong... And she didn't seem to harbor any malice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm guessing that this prisoner was locked up because the Demon Lord didn't like her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm guessing that this prisoner was locked up because the Demon Lord didn't like her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm guessing that this prisoner was locked up because the Demon Lord didn't like her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, we were running away from the devil's henchmen when we ran into the devil himself, and that's when Ms. Lugh used the dagger to escape.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, we were running away from the devil's henchmen when we ran into the devil himself, and that's when Ms. Lugh used the dagger to escape.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, we were running away from the devil's henchmen when we ran into the devil himself, and that's when Ms. Lugh used the dagger to escape.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We couldn't find... where the Golden Branch was.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We couldn't find... where the Golden Branch was.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We couldn't find... where the Golden Branch was.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see. But no need to be discouraged.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see. But no need to be discouraged.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see. But no need to be discouraged.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You did good. It is better for you to return empty-handed than not returning at all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You did good. It is better for you to return empty-handed than not returning at all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You did good. It is better for you to return empty-handed than not returning at all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The devil wasn't the only one there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The devil wasn't the only one there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The devil wasn't the only one there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? There were more?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? There were more?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? There were more?

root.m_Talk_ENG: While he was talking to us... I could feel something getting closer from beyond the snowstorm.
root.m_Talk_DEU: While he was talking to us... I could feel something getting closer from beyond the snowstorm.
root.m_Talk_FRA: While he was talking to us... I could feel something getting closer from beyond the snowstorm.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But we had to flee before we could get a better look.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But we had to flee before we could get a better look.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But we had to flee before we could get a better look.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An ominous entity that could be felt even with a devil in your presence...
root.m_Talk_DEU: An ominous entity that could be felt even with a devil in your presence...
root.m_Talk_FRA: An ominous entity that could be felt even with a devil in your presence...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is a shame, but it would be best not to go back there ever again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is a shame, but it would be best not to go back there ever again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is a shame, but it would be best not to go back there ever again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?! But we haven't found the Golden Branch yet!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?! But we haven't found the Golden Branch yet!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?! But we haven't found the Golden Branch yet!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A Demon Lord is as persistent as a devil.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A Demon Lord is as persistent as a devil.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A Demon Lord is as persistent as a devil.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As long as they know you have been there, there will not be another time of going back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As long as they know you have been there, there will not be another time of going back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As long as they know you have been there, there will not be another time of going back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good work, you two. Go get some rest as I am sure you are both exhausted.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good work, you two. Go get some rest as I am sure you are both exhausted.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good work, you two. Go get some rest as I am sure you are both exhausted.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then... can I have some grapes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then... can I have some grapes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then... can I have some grapes?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have already prepared them on the table in the next room for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have already prepared them on the table in the next room for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have already prepared them on the table in the next room for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... She really seems like a little kid at times like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... She really seems like a little kid at times like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... She really seems like a little kid at times like this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once winter comes to the Stump, finding fruit will be difficult.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once winter comes to the Stump, finding fruit will be difficult.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once winter comes to the Stump, finding fruit will be difficult.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you should have some as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you should have some as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you should have some as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you know, Merlin?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you know, Merlin?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you know, Merlin?

root.m_Talk_ENG: About the place we went to?
root.m_Talk_DEU: About the place we went to?
root.m_Talk_FRA: About the place we went to?

root.m_Talk_ENG: As I have told you before your departure, it is the first time we have observed the other side of the world with our technology.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As I have told you before your departure, it is the first time we have observed the other side of the world with our technology.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As I have told you before your departure, it is the first time we have observed the other side of the world with our technology.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I merely assumed what kind of place it would be.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I merely assumed what kind of place it would be.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I merely assumed what kind of place it would be.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However...
root.m_Talk_DEU: However...
root.m_Talk_FRA: However...

root.m_Talk_ENG: seeing your expression seems to tell me that it was familiar to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: seeing your expression seems to tell me that it was familiar to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: seeing your expression seems to tell me that it was familiar to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The hometown I remembered had turned into white gelid lands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The hometown I remembered had turned into white gelid lands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The hometown I remembered had turned into white gelid lands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was all in ruins without a single trace of people.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was all in ruins without a single trace of people.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was all in ruins without a single trace of people.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Nothing can escape the grasp of the gelid lands' plague.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Nothing can escape the grasp of the gelid lands' plague.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Nothing can escape the grasp of the gelid lands' plague.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is simply a matter of time. As it was for Avalon in the past, and the same for us now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is simply a matter of time. As it was for Avalon in the past, and the same for us now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is simply a matter of time. As it was for Avalon in the past, and the same for us now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In Elysion... everyone lived with the belief that they would be safe from the gelid lands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In Elysion... everyone lived with the belief that they would be safe from the gelid lands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In Elysion... everyone lived with the belief that they would be safe from the gelid lands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But in just a few years... how could something like this even happen?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But in just a few years... how could something like this even happen?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But in just a few years... how could something like this even happen?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Beliefs often collapse in the face of uncertain reality.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Beliefs often collapse in the face of uncertain reality.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Beliefs often collapse in the face of uncertain reality.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even when Avalon still stood tall, everyone there also believed in something similar.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even when Avalon still stood tall, everyone there also believed in something similar.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even when Avalon still stood tall, everyone there also believed in something similar.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, a plague unforeseen by prophecies spread throughout the world, and with the Demon Lord Thagirion's descent...
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, a plague unforeseen by prophecies spread throughout the world, and with the Demon Lord Thagirion's descent...
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, a plague unforeseen by prophecies spread throughout the world, and with the Demon Lord Thagirion's descent...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Avalon, which I thought would last for an eternity, abruptly turned into the gelid lands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Avalon, which I thought would last for an eternity, abruptly turned into the gelid lands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Avalon, which I thought would last for an eternity, abruptly turned into the gelid lands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...! That's just what's recorded in history!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...! That's just what's recorded in history!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...! That's just what's recorded in history!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Elysion had nothing to do with the Demon Lord's descent!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Elysion had nothing to do with the Demon Lord's descent!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Elysion had nothing to do with the Demon Lord's descent!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fifty years ago. The sun disappeared for an entire day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fifty years ago. The sun disappeared for an entire day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fifty years ago. The sun disappeared for an entire day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The lightless sky made anyone looking up lose their minds, and the earth was rampant with monsters and bloodshed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The lightless sky made anyone looking up lose their minds, and the earth was rampant with monsters and bloodshed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The lightless sky made anyone looking up lose their minds, and the earth was rampant with monsters and bloodshed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That omen was the same as when the Demon Lord Thagirion descended.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That omen was the same as when the Demon Lord Thagirion descended.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That omen was the same as when the Demon Lord Thagirion descended.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...? Fifty years ago?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...? Fifty years ago?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...? Fifty years ago?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I've never heard of such a catastrophic event... happening twice. It wasn't in any historical records.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I've never heard of such a catastrophic event... happening twice. It wasn't in any historical records.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I've never heard of such a catastrophic event... happening twice. It wasn't in any historical records.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, you never heard of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, you never heard of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, you never heard of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Around the time Elysion was falling, you were asleep in the middle of the gelid lands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Around the time Elysion was falling, you were asleep in the middle of the gelid lands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Around the time Elysion was falling, you were asleep in the middle of the gelid lands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That can't be right!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That can't be right!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That can't be right!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was born in Elysion! I still vividly remember the things I experienced there!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was born in Elysion! I still vividly remember the things I experienced there!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was born in Elysion! I still vividly remember the things I experienced there!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am not doubting your memories.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am not doubting your memories.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am not doubting your memories.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it is also true that you have no idea how long you were trapped beneath the snow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it is also true that you have no idea how long you were trapped beneath the snow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it is also true that you have no idea how long you were trapped beneath the snow.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fifty years? That's ridiculous.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fifty years? That's ridiculous.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fifty years? That's ridiculous.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even the strongest of Helgons cannot survive trapped underneath the snow for fifty years.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even the strongest of Helgons cannot survive trapped underneath the snow for fifty years.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even the strongest of Helgons cannot survive trapped underneath the snow for fifty years.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yet, it is also not impossible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yet, it is also not impossible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yet, it is also not impossible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If a fairy has been protecting you, that is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If a fairy has been protecting you, that is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If a fairy has been protecting you, that is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A... fairy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A... fairy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A... fairy?
